response.justification: Bogdan has strong software engineering credentials and meets the seniority threshold (Bachelor's + 14 years), but he lacks the essential technical foundation for this hardware-focused role. His entire career is in web and backend development with no demonstrated experience in SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, hardware performance analysis, or AI accelerator optimization. Current AI-agent infrastructure work is tangentially related but doesn't address the hardware-architecture focus required for a Principal Performance Architect position.
strengths: 14+ years of senior/staff-level software engineering with proven leadership across diverse organizations
Track record optimizing low-latency systems (Dunnhumby) and understanding performance tradeoffs through system-level design
Demonstrates rapid mastery of unfamiliar technology stacks (D, TypeScript, C++, cloud infrastructure) showing learning capacity
concerns: Zero experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware architecture, or hardware-software co-design—the core responsibilities of the role
Career entirely in web and backend software; no background in GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD systems, or hardware performance profiling
No demonstrated expertise in deep neural network workload optimization, AI accelerator design, or power-efficiency tradeoff analysis

key_factors.factor: Missing SoC/IP and hardware architecture expertise
No GPU or AI accelerator optimization background
Staff-level seniority and demonstrated learning ability
